diarized_transcript:
[Agent] Thank you for calling HoYoverse Player Support. How can I help you today?
[Caller] Hi, my Genesis Crystals haven't shown up from a purchase I made on PSN yesterday.
[Agent] Sure, I can look into that. What's your UID?
[Caller] 603245891.
[Agent] Got it, pulling up the account. I see your last order was ORD202604190007 for 49.99 USD, purchased April 19th on PSN. The payment cleared but the Genesis Crystals show as pending delivery. Let me retry delivery now.
[Caller] Yeah, please.
[Agent] Done. I've run retry_crystal_delivery on ORD202604190007. You should see 3280 Genesis Crystals in your account within about 60 seconds.
[Caller] Great, let me check. Yeah, they're here now. Thanks.
[Agent] Anything else I can help with?
[Caller] No, that's it.
[Agent] Have a great day.
